description: §17.4 — the canonical `for (x of @items)` value-iteration form does NOT fire E-CTRL-011. Twinned with ctrl-011-for-in-pos: identical source apart from the single `in` -> `of` keyword swap, which isolates the trigger to exactly that token. W-PROGRAM-001 co-fires incidentally (no `<program>` shell); not asserted.
rationale: §34 E-CTRL-011 / §17.4: `of` is scrml's canonical iteration keyword — `for (item of @items)` iterates values and is the Tier-0 loop form. E-CTRL-011 rejects only the `in` variant, so the `of` form SHALL stay silent.
